# ShellMail - Email for AI Agents

> Give your AI agent a real email inbox in under 60 seconds.

## What is ShellMail?

ShellMail provides email addresses for AI agents via a simple REST API. Send and receive email. No SMTP, no IMAP, no servers to manage. Create an address, send mail, receive mail, extract OTPs automatically.

## Quick Start

```bash
# Install CLI
npx shellmail setup

# Or use the API directly
curl -X POST https://shellmail.ai/api/addresses \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"local":"my-agent","recovery_email":"you@email.com"}'
```

## MCP Server (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Cline)

Add to your MCP config (e.g., claude_desktop_config.json):

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "shellmail": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "shellmail-mcp"],
      "env": {
        "SHELLMAIL_TOKEN": "sm_your_token_here"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

Available tools: shellmail_inbox, shellmail_read, shellmail_otp, shellmail_send, shellmail_search, shellmail_sent, shellmail_delete, shellmail_mark_read

## API Base URL

https://shellmail.ai

## Authentication

All endpoints (except POST /api/addresses) require Bearer token auth:
```
Authorization: Bearer sm_your_token_here
```

## Core Endpoints

### Create Address (no auth required)
POST /api/addresses
Body: {"local": "my-agent", "recovery_email": "you@email.com"}
Returns: {"address": "my-agent@shellmail.ai", "token": "sm_..."}

### List Emails
GET /api/mail
Query params: unread=true, limit=50, offset=0
Returns: {"address": "...", "unread_count": 2, "emails": [...]}

### Read Email
GET /api/mail/:id
Returns: {"id": "...", "from_addr": "...", "subject": "...", "body_text": "...", "body_html": "..."}

### Get Latest OTP (supports long-polling)
GET /api/mail/otp
Query params: timeout=30000 (wait up to 30s for OTP), from=github.com (filter by sender)
Returns: {"found": true, "code": "123456", "from": "...", "subject": "..."}

### Search Emails
GET /api/mail/search
Query params: q=keyword, from=sender, has_otp=true, limit=20
Returns: {"count": 5, "emails": [...]}

### Mark Read/Archive
PATCH /api/mail/:id
Body: {"is_read": true} or {"is_archived": true}

### Delete Email
DELETE /api/mail/:id

### Send Email
POST /api/mail/send
Body: {"to": "user@example.com", "subject": "Hello", "body_text": "Hi there!", "body_html": "<p>Hi there!</p>"}
Optional: "reply_to_id": "original-email-id" (for threading)
Returns: {"ok": true, "id": "...", "message_id": "<...@shellmail.ai>"}
Rate limits: Free 10/day, Shell 50/day, Reef 100/day

### List Sent Emails
GET /api/mail/sent
Query params: limit=50, offset=0
Returns: {"address": "...", "sent_count": 5, "emails": [...]}

### Configure Webhook
PUT /api/webhook
Body: {"url": "https://your-server.com/webhook"}
Returns: {"url": "...", "secret": "whsec_..."}

### Get Webhook Config
GET /api/webhook

### Delete Webhook
DELETE /api/webhook

### Recover Token (sends new token to recovery email)
POST /api/recover
Body: {"address": "my-agent@shellmail.ai", "recovery_email": "you@email.com"}

### Delete Address
DELETE /api/addresses/me

## Key Features

- **Send & Receive**: Full email capability for your agents
- **OTP Extraction**: Verification codes are automatically extracted from emails
- **Long Polling**: Wait for OTPs with ?timeout=30000 (up to 30 seconds)
- **Webhooks**: Get notified instantly when email arrives (HMAC-SHA256 signed)
- **Slack & Discord**: Paste Slack/Discord webhook URLs and get formatted notifications
- **TypeScript SDK**: `npm install @shellmail/sdk` for first-class TypeScript support
- **Multi-Inbox Profiles**: Manage multiple addresses with CLI profiles
- **Reply Threading**: Use reply_to_id to maintain email threads
- **Ephemeral**: Messages auto-delete after 7 days (free tier)
- **Edge-fast**: Runs on Cloudflare Workers globally

## TypeScript SDK

```bash
npm install @shellmail/sdk
```

```typescript
import { ShellMail } from '@shellmail/sdk';

const mail = new ShellMail({ token: 'sm_...' });
const inbox = await mail.inbox();
const code = await mail.waitForOtp(30, 'github.com');
await mail.send({ to: 'user@example.com', subject: 'Hello', bodyText: 'Hi!' });
```

## Slack & Discord Webhooks

Just paste your Slack or Discord webhook URL - payloads are auto-formatted:

```bash
# Slack
shellmail webhook -s "https://hooks.slack.com/services/T.../B.../xxx"

# Discord
shellmail webhook -s "https://discord.com/api/webhooks/123/abc"
```

## Rate Limits

- Token recovery: 3 attempts per address per hour
- General API: No strict limits, be reasonable

## CLI Commands

```bash
npx shellmail setup          # Create new address interactively
npx shellmail inbox          # List emails
npx shellmail inbox -u       # List unread only
npx shellmail read <id>      # Read specific email
npx shellmail send <to> -s "Subject" -b "Body"  # Send email
npx shellmail reply <id> -b "Reply text"        # Reply to email
npx shellmail sent           # List sent emails
npx shellmail otp            # Get latest OTP code
npx shellmail otp -w 30      # Wait up to 30s for OTP
npx shellmail search --otp   # Find emails with OTPs
npx shellmail webhook -s URL # Set webhook
npx shellmail status         # Check service status
```

## Environment Variables

SHELLMAIL_TOKEN - Your API token (alternative to config file)
SHELLMAIL_API_URL - API base URL (default: https://shellmail.ai)

## Example: Wait for GitHub OTP

```bash
# Using CLI
shellmail otp -w 30 -f github.com

# Using API
curl "https://shellmail.ai/api/mail/otp?timeout=30000&from=github.com" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sm_..."
```

## Example: Send an Email

```bash
# Using CLI
shellmail send user@example.com -s "Hello" -b "Hi from my agent!"

# Using API
curl -X POST "https://shellmail.ai/api/mail/send" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sm_..." \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"to":"user@example.com","subject":"Hello","body_text":"Hi from my agent!"}'
```

## Example: Reply to an Email

```bash
# Using CLI
shellmail reply abc123 -b "Thanks for your email!"

# Using API (with threading)
curl -X POST "https://shellmail.ai/api/mail/send" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sm_..." \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"to":"user@example.com","subject":"Re: Hello","body_text":"Thanks!","reply_to_id":"abc123"}'
```

## Webhook Payload

When email arrives, we POST to your webhook URL:
```json
{
  "event": "email.received",
  "address": "my-agent@shellmail.ai",
  "email": {
    "id": "abc123",
    "from_addr": "noreply@github.com",
    "from_name": "GitHub",
    "subject": "Your verification code",
    "received_at": "2026-02-24T12:00:00Z",
    "otp_code": "123456",
    "otp_link": null
  }
}
```

Verify signature with X-ShellMail-Signature header using your webhook secret (HMAC-SHA256).

## Links

- Website: https://shellmail.ai
- GitHub: https://github.com/aaronbatchelder/shellmail
- MCP Server: https://www.npmjs.com/package/shellmail-mcp
- CLI: https://www.npmjs.com/package/shellmail
- Health Check: https://shellmail.ai/health
